mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.k3_id, t.f_name, t.f_number, u1.user_name AS f_creator_id, t.f_description, d.name AS f_currency_id, t.f_effective_date, t.f_expiry_date, t.f_price_object, t.f_limit_customer, t.f_limit_sales_man, t.f_price_type, u2.fname AS f_xsy, t.f_khjc, t.f_create_date, t.f_modify_date, u3.user_name AS f_modifier_id FROM t_sales_price t LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON t.f_creator_id = u1.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee u2 ON t.f_xsy = u2.fid LEFT JOIN sys_user u3 ON t.f_modifier_id = u3.k3_key LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d ON t.f_currency_id = d.kingdee AND d.category_name = '币别' WHERE t.id = #{id}

select id, k3_id, f_name, f_number, f_creator_id, f_description, f_currency_id, f_effective_date, f_expiry_date, f_price_object, f_limit_customer, f_limit_sales_man, f_price_type, f_xsy, f_khjc, f_create_date, f_modify_date, f_modifier_id from t_sales_price where f_number in
#{fNumber}

SELECT t.id, t.k3_id, t.f_name, t.f_number, u1.user_name AS f_creator_id, t.f_description, d.name AS f_currency_id, t.f_effective_date, t.f_expiry_date, t.f_price_object, t.f_limit_customer, t.f_limit_sales_man, t.f_price_type, u2.fname AS f_xsy, t.f_khjc, t.f_create_date, t.f_modify_date, u3.user_name AS f_modifier_id FROM t_sales_price t LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON t.f_creator_id = u1.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee u2 ON t.f_xsy = u2.fid LEFT JOIN sys_user u3 ON t.f_modifier_id = u3.k3_key LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d ON t.f_currency_id = d.kingdee AND d.category_name = '币别' ${ew.customSqlSegment}
